body:
Hi Amara,

Following up on our earlier exchange about the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) portfolio overlap we flagged — I've been thinking more about the [Meridian Grid](company/meridian-grid) situation and whether a co-investment structure actually makes sense here given the timeline they're working with. Their Series A round is moving faster than I anticipated, and I want to make sure we're aligned before either of us gets too deep into diligence. Would love to grab 30 minutes this week to compare notes and figure out if there's a clean path forward for both firms, or whether one of us should take the lead and loop the other in as a follow-on. Let me know what your calendar looks like.

Best,
Elena
